# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI-assisted problem solving speeds up DSA practice on CodeGrind
- Summary: Show how the Azure OpenAI-powered assistant helps users tackle LeetCode-style problems faster, with real-time guidance inside the CodeGrind editor.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-problem-solving
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assisted-problem-solving
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-27-codegrind-ai-assisted-problem-solving.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now pairs real-time AI assistance with hands-on DSA challenges. Users can ask the Azure OpenAI assistant for hints, approach strategies, and code-skeleton ideas while working in the in-browser editor, enabling faster learning and iterative improvement without leaving the platform.
- CTA: Try a practice problem now and chat with the AI assistant to get guided hints
- Visual brief: Short screen-recorded demo: a user opens a problem in CodeGrind, toggles the Azure OpenAI assistant, requests a hint, views a suggested approach with a quick code scaffold, then runs the solution to see results. Caption: 'AI-assisted problem solving on CodeGrind'.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
